// Suppressions for cppcheck
// Format: error_id:file:line

// Ignore CMake-generated files
*:CMakeFiles/*

// Ignore third-party libraries
*:ff.h
*:ch.h

// Ignore template metaprogramming (false positives)
noExplicitConstructor:firmware/application/file.hpp
toomanyconfigs:CMakeCCompilerId.c
toomanyconfigs:CMakeCXXCompilerId.cpp

// Known conditions - these are intentional (hardware tuning with error checking)
knownConditionTrueFalse:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_analyzer.cpp:638
knownConditionTrueFalse:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_analyzer.cpp:683

// Local classes are intentionally defined inline
noConstructor:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_settings.cpp:419
noConstructor:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_settings.cpp:457

// Hash-based lookup is intentionally linear probing (optimized for embedded)
useStlAlgorithm:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_signal_processing.cpp:56
useStlAlgorithm:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_signal_processing.cpp:83
useStlAlgorithm:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_signal_processing.cpp:102

// Value-initialization is correct for DisplayDroneEntry
useInitializationList:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_analyzer.cpp:2337

// backup_path is used for file operations
unreadVariable:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_settings.cpp:132
unreadVariable:firmware/application/apps/enhanced_drone_analyzer/ui_enhanced_drone_settings.cpp:157

// Normal branch limit - exhaustive check is too slow
normalCheckLevelMaxBranches:*
